videos.description:
কাঁচের ওপারে (Beyond the Glass) is a dark Bengali indie rock song about invisible love, silent longing and emotional distance that can never be crossed.

The song explores the feeling of loving someone who lives in the same world but behind an invisible glass wall — close enough to see, yet impossible to reach.

Driven by haunting synth textures, industrial rock energy and melancholic storytelling
